title: Saddle Recipe Data Pack
description: Have you ever felt like finding a saddle instead of crafting one is just too annoying?
body:
# Saddle Recipe Data Pack

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

20100625-2; Added saddles. Saddles do not drop from saddled pigs. Saddles can be found in the new dungeon chests.

On 25 June 2010 when saddles were added to the game they weren't all the different aside from texture and that saddles didn't drop from saddled pigs until 12w36a.

5 leather and 3 iron will get you a saddle. 
- 1 leather, 1 leather, 1 leather
- 1 leather, 1 iron, 1 leather
- 1 iron, empty space, 1 iron

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72c30ffaff59bd57ac0074905f523d1152ba427e.png)
